title: YOUTH DEVELOPMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: TRANSITIONAL YOUTH YOUTH DEVELOPMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supervised home for pregnant and parenting teens. Assists homeless teen mothers and their children by providing a supportive environment and teaching life skills to become self-sufficient while completing their high school education or equivalent. Eligibility: Pregnant and parenting females ages 18-24 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 350-7215 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 350-7215 Main phone Main phone (503) 350-7215 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Maternity Homes Post Pregnancy Shelter/Transitional Housing Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - YOUTH TRANSITIONAL HOUSING PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
